who: procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 10-20 vendor invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 10-20 vendor invoices/month, delays in onboarding causes late payments to vendors. We streamline the vendor onboarding process instead of manual vendor onboarding processes.
problem: Delays in vendor onboarding due to manual verification processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for procurement managers
try_it: Let users try W-9 form verification and vendor database on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing vendor data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Reduce steps required in the onboarding process
